note: AI Engine page advanced to v0.20.0 with the new M20 (Experiment Planner + Replay Sandbox) section. Closes the method gap: the engine can now turn a hypothesis into a project-aware test plan, counterfactually evaluate a proposed rule against M10 historical outcomes, and emit a structured GO / MAYBE / NO-GO verdict. The operator's golden rule is enforced — when historical_count is below the minimum (default 20) the strongest possible verdict is MAYBE, never GO, regardless of precision or recall. Three new capability gates (deny-by-default): can_plan_experiment and can_replay_experiment are true for materials / geaspirit / useful_compute only; can_execute_experiment is FALSE for every project (asserted by belt+braces tests). Tests 1,239 / 1,239 green. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
